offer: For medical clinics processing 5–15 compliance reports/month, delays in report generation cause regulatory penalties. We automate report creation and distribution instead of manual report generation and distribution.
problem: Timely creation and distribution of regulatory compliance reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinics
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to medical clinics with demo video
Join community forums for compliance tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation and user-friendly dashboard
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
